text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So this is the taste of dirt... The gods are deeply
amused, I'm sure...
choice_data_list: Is that the best the Overlord can do?
Is that the best the Overlord can do?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So this is the taste of dirt... The gods are deeply
amused, I'm sure...
choice_data_list: Is that the best the Overlord can do?
Is that the best the Overlord can do?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh... That is the plan, of course.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though obstacles bar the path ahead... Though
their thorns wound me as I walk...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is a path worthy of the Overlord to travel. Thus,
it is the Overlord's path!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let the gods see for themselves! My majesty does
not yield in the face of hardship!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then I ask you this... Just what is strength?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To me, it is the ability to march down your own
path—to keep your legs churning no matter how
many times you fall.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will run, so that I may traverse the Overlord's
path!
choice_data_list: For that is what it means to be the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Observe for yourself. My resurrection
burns with the flames of a phoenix...
